notes: Fixed section: 554 nodes / 482 edges before review. All complexity values already normalized to simple/moderate/complex with no unknowns. No unknown node types present. No nodes with missing IDs.

Critical chain verified: file:src/api/main.py -> file:src/core/ranking_service.py -> file:src/models/models.py -> file:src/models/database.py chain is fully connected with correct import edges. file:src/models/database.py -> file:src/models/models.py edge also present. All five import-map-backed edges for main.py are present.

Three file nodes were entirely absent from the assembled graph despite being listed in batches.json for batch-35: src/core/ap_poll_service.py (353 lines, AP poll comparison logic), src/core/transfer_portal_service.py (187 lines, transfer portal aggregation), and utilities/finalize_season_stats.py (531 lines, season finalization orchestrator). Batch-35 analyzed frontend/js files instead, leaving these three files unanalyzed. Stub nodes were created with summaries derived from reading the actual source files.

Five import edges backed by the import map were missing due to the unanalyzed files: ap_poll_service.py -> models.py, finalize_season_stats.py -> ap_poll_service.py, finalize_season_stats.py -> ranking_service.py, finalize_season_stats.py -> database.py, finalize_season_stats.py -> models.py. All five were added.

main.py lazy-imports cfbd_client.py (inside function bodies at lines 1157, 2051, 2213, 2370, 2683) and position_service.py (lines 577, 2504, 2554). These do NOT appear in the static import map so no edges were added per instructions. This is an expected limitation of static import analysis.
ranking_service.py does not import database.py at all — it receives Session objects via dependency injection. The missing ranking_service -> database edge is correct behavior, not a gap.

cfb_elo_ranking.py exists in src/core/ and appears in no batch output and is not in the import map. It may be an archived/unused algorithm file. No node was created since it is not backed by import map data.
Final assembled graph: 557 nodes, 487 edges. No dangling edges remain.
